name: Johnson School Bus Svc
principals: Steve Johnson, Dan Johnson, Judy Holzmann (former owners, third-generation Johnson family; founder Aaron W. Johnson, 1942)
service_types: school, charter, special-needs (ADA-accessible), athletic/field trip, shared-ride paratransit (Specialized Transport Services subsidiary)
districts_or_customers: 14 school districts in southeast Wisconsin (West Bend, Cedarburg, Mequon-Thiensville area), ~11 terminal locations
recent_news: Sold by Johnson family to Canada-based Landmark Student Transportation in early 2020 after 77+ years of family ownership; Landmark retained the Johnson Bus and STS brands and existing staff.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Already strategically owned by Landmark Student Transportation since 2020; would only be relevant as a platform-level conversation with Landmark, not a family-owned acquisition.

name: Riteway Bus Svc
owner_or_parent: independent (GO Riteway Transportation Group; Bast family)
principals: Ron Bast, Rochelle Bast, Wendy Bast, RJ Bast (third-gen co-owners/Vice Chairs); founders Rollie and Pearl Bast (1957)
service_types: school, special-needs, charter/motorcoach, shuttle, athletic/extracurricular, executive sedan/limo
districts_or_customers: 35-39+ school districts across Wisconsin and Northern Illinois (Germantown, Brown Deer, Cedarburg, Mequon-Thiensville, Oconomowoc, Chippewa Falls, West Bend, Franklin, etc.); 25+ Midwest locations including Random Lake terminal
recent_news: Acquired Wittenberg Bus Service (Hartford, WI) and Chippewa Yellow Bus Company (Chippewa Falls, WI); celebrated 60 years in business (2017); named new president; continues to consolidate Wisconsin school bus market as a strategic regional acquirer.
fit_notes: LARGE family-owned regional consolidator and itself an acquirer; would be a transformative platform-scale acquisition (not a typical tuck-in) and likely a strategic competitor to Summit in WI. Third-generation Bast family ownership could create a future succession opportunity but no current signal.

name: Dee Bus Svc Inc
principals: Leo Dee (founder, 1946); George Dee (second-gen, expanded into school bus contracts); Donna Hunter (Dispatcher/Office Manager)
service_types: school, special-needs (46 SPED vans), regular ed home-to-school, athletic/field trip
districts_or_customers: North Middlesex Regional (Ashby, Pepperell, Townsend), Ayer/Shirley, Groton/Dunstable, Westford, Nashoba Valley Tech, Clinton, Harvard, Littleton, Maynard, Tyngsboro, Lunenburg, Montachusett Regional Voc Tech
recent_news: No recent M&A or major news found; operates ~370 power units per FMCSA registration; long-standing family operator in north-central MA with diverse district book.
website: https://www.facebook.com/DeeBusService/ (no standalone corporate site found; phone 978-448-3322)
fit_notes: STRONG tuck-in candidate: independent, family-owned, ~200 bus + 46 SPED van fleet, deep multi-district MA book including SPED (a high-margin niche), 80-year history with second-gen leadership and aging family — classic succession profile in Summit's footprint.

name: Jones School Bus Svc
principals: Steve Christison listed as President in source data (note: a Steve Christison is publicly identified as Contract Manager at Illinois Central School Bus / Wisconsin Central School Bus, suggesting possible name confusion or affiliation)
service_types: school (per source data; not confirmed online)
districts_or_customers: Unknown — Belvidere CUSD 100 is served by First Student (Illinois Central renewed/awarded), not Jones; possible smaller/private/parochial routes or Boone County area
recent_news: No independent web presence, no news of sale or activity found. Belvidere SD 100's primary contractor is First Student per district website.
website: Not confirmed; data file's 'schoolbusfleet.com' is a trade publication, not the company site; no standalone corporate site located
fit_notes: Low-confidence target — minimal digital footprint, district appears to be served by First Student, and the named exec may actually work at Illinois Central School Bus (Beacon Mobility-owned). Needs phone verification (815-544-1520) before further diligence; likely either very small/niche operator or a misattributed record.

name: American International Bus LLC
owner_or_parent: unknown (sole-member LLC per data; Carlos A. Becerra listed as Owner)
principals: Carlos A. Becerra Nue (Owner per source data)
service_types: unconfirmed — possibly charter/shuttle/international service; no evidence of school district contracts found
districts_or_customers: None confirmed; Scottsdale USD uses internal department; American Leadership Academy and AIA (American International Academy) have their own programs but no link found to this LLC
recent_news: No news, no website (data file's 'jerseydispatch.com' is unrelated), no Arizona school district contract found. Registered address is a PMB (mail drop) at 7620 E McKellips Rd #4 PMB 60 — typical of a very small/virtual operator.
website: Not confirmed; no operating website found
fit_notes: Likely NOT a fit. PMB-only address, no website, no confirmable school district contracts, and the name pattern plus owner profile suggest a small charter/intercity/private shuttle LLC rather than a yellow-bus school transportation contractor. Disqualify pending phone verification.
